price_per_token_tooltip: The cost of each Point in this early stage.
fomo_title: 🍝 Join La Piccola’s Club and Score Exclusive Points!
fomo_desc: Get in early with the Club della Nonna and become part of our family! Buy your Points now to unlock discounts, free meals, and awesome perks at La Piccola Italia. It’s super safe, easy, and packed with real rewards—over 100,000 customers are already with us. Don’t miss out on the dolce vita!
fomo_dao_tip: Our community calls the shots: vote for new dishes or events with your Influence Points. Everything’s fair and clear!
fomo_liquidity_tip: Your Points are safe, and you’ll always have access to your perks. No tricks, just good vibes!
fomo_contract_tip: Check out how our loyalty program works, totally transparent.
fomo_router_tip: Use your Points for discounts or meals, all clear and easy to follow.
fomo_tag_tested: Trusted by thousands of customers, 100% reliable
title: Buy Your Points
disabled: The Points program is paused for now, check back soon!
in_development: We’re cooking up something special for the Points program, almost ready!
label: Club Points
description: Buy Points to enjoy exclusive benefits at La Piccola Italia.
description_tooltip: A bit about La Piccola Italia and our love for Italian food.
address_tooltip: Unique code for our program, you can check it in our system if you want.
buy_success: Purchase successful! You’ve got your Points!
buy_error: Oops, something went wrong buying the Points.
you_receive_tooltip: Number of Points you’ll get after fees.
tokens_tooltip: Points bought vs. total available in this stage.
price_tooltip: How much each Point costs in your chosen payment method (e.g. pesos, dollars).
pair_price_tooltip: Estimated value of Points based on our current menu prices.
total_raised_tooltip: Total collected in this stage (in your payment method).
fee_tooltip: Small fee to help us manage the program and keep improving your experience.
your_contribution_tooltip: The Points you have bought in this stage.
liquidity_percent_tooltip: What part of the funds is set aside for customer benefits.
liquidity_status_tooltip: Shows if your benefits are guaranteed or for how long they're available.
liquidity_pool_tooltip: Code for the fund where your benefits are managed, if available.
beneficiary_wallet_tooltip: The account where the restaurant receives your payment.
